feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP B1 Web Client does not support approval templates based on user query?
entry.content:
Hello Experts

Could you please help confirm whether SAP Business One Web Client does not support approval templates based on user queries (SQL-based conditions)?

We are currently encountering the following error when adding a document via Web Client:

“Adding the approval draft failed. Web Client doesn't support approval template when based on user query.”

If this is a confirmed limitation, may I ask if there are any recommended workarounds for handling such approval scenarios in the Web Client?

Thank you

entry.title: SAP Shutdown
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using SAP B1 with SQL Database. we are having 80 user and 2 database. One database where user is 15, its working ok. But another database where User is 65 and database size is 80GB, it shutdown randomly and many times some tables connectivity is lost. 

From next month we are going to add 3rd database with 65 user. These 65 users are simultaneously used 2 database. So my concern is what server configuration we required ?

We are using our own Server with RDP connection for each user.

entry.title: How do I USE an OUT-Table?
entry.content:
I have a procedure that has an OUT table variable:

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE "q_FollowLinkedTables"
(
  IN  EntryNumber int,
  IN  EntryType   int,
  IN  Backwards   BOOLEAN,
  OUT Result      "q_tt_EntryMap"
)

LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT 
SQL SECURITY INVOKER

AS
  LineTable    NVARCHAR(10);
  tSQL         NVARCHAR(4000);
  ActualTab    "q_tt_EntryMap";
  AllTab       "q_tt_EntryMap";
  ActualNumber int;
  ActualType   int;
  TypeField    NVARCHAR(10);
  NumberField  NVARCHAR(10);
  counter      int;

BEGIN
  counter      := 0;
  ActualNumber := EntryNumber;
  ActualType   := EntryType;
  IF :Backwards = TRUE THEN
    TypeField    := 'BaseType';
    NumberField  := 'BaseEntry';
  ELSE
    TypeField    := 'TargetType';
    NumberField  := 'TrgetEntry';
  END IF;
  LineTable    := "q_GetDocLinesTable"(EntryType);

  WHILE :LineTable IS NOT NULL
  DO
    counter := counter + 1;
    tSQL := '
    SELECT DISTINCT "'|| :NumberField ||'" AS "Entry", "'|| :TypeField ||'" AS "Type"
    FROM ' || :LineTable || '
    WHERE "DocEntry" = ' || :EntryNumber || ' AND "'|| :TypeField ||'" <> -1
    ';
    EXECUTE IMMEDIATE tSQL into ActualTab;
    IF IS_EMPTY(:ActualTab) THEN
      BREAK;
    END IF;
    
    SELECT "Type","Entry" INTO EntryType, EntryNumber FROM :ActualTab;

    INSERT INTO :AllTab VALUES (EntryNumber, EntryType);

    LineTable := "q_GetDocLinesTable"(EntryType);
    
    /* reasonable safeguard to prevent recursive locks */
    IF :counter > 10 THEN
      BREAK;
    END IF;

  END WHILE;

  Result = SELECT * FROM :AllTab;

END;

If i call this procedure in the HANA Studio console, I get the correct result:

But I need this in a variable in the calling procedure. When I do... 

CALL "q_FollowLinkedTables"(EntryNumber, EntryType, TRUE, :Result);

.. that leads to "Not supported combination of DML operations for variable" -what? How is this supposed to be done? I want to give this procedure a variable that I can further process in the calling procedure.

entry.title: SAP B1 - create company from package error on OUSR
entry.content:
Hello experts,

On SAP 1000.300.20, when I create new company from package I had error on OUSR

2026-03-27 09:25:55.358101 Sys NoteLgAlw I Biz Start OnCreateDefaults, objectId=111, table=OFPR # # TID=11896 _Application.cpp 3243 Customized=0
2026-03-27 09:25:55.392372 Sys NoteLgAlw I Biz End OnCreateDefaults, objectId=111, table=OFPR # # TID=11896 _Application.cpp 3248 Customized=0
2026-03-27 09:25:55.403515 Sys NoteLgAlw I Biz Start OnCreateDefaults, objectId=12, table=OUSR # # TID=11896 _Application.cpp 3243 Customized=0
2026-03-27 09:25:58.739391 Sys Err I Biz CreateDefaults failed, err number is -2028 # # TID=11896 _BusinessObjectMethods.h 34 ID=4cf04c30 BO=Users Customized=0
2026-03-27 09:25:58.739391 Sys NoteLgAlw I Biz End OnCreateDefaults, objectId=12, table=OUSR # # TID=11896 _Application.cpp 3248 Customized=0
2026-03-27 09:25:58.739391 Sys Err I Biz Failed to create object, objectId=12 # # TID=11896 _Application.cpp 3255 Customized=0
2026-03-27 09:25:58.740485 Sys Err I Biz No matching records found (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183] # # TID=11896

Please help me. Thank you very much

entry.title: Scheduled report query manager
entry.content:
experts,

I am trying to schedule a query report using below function, but no idea where to find error comes from. window services are changed to user account (admin)....please be advised.

Looking for first schedule to be executed before/on 20260330 14:19

Found Scheduled Report ID: 1

Added SRA2 entry

Handling schedule

XML configuration sent to SAP Business One Client:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>

<SR>

<R D="20260330" T="1419" O="N">1</R>

<L S="TWSSAP" T="15" C="" LL="2" CU="" CP="" LS="" SLD="https://twssap:40000/sld/sld0100.svc" LC="3"/>

</SR>

Starting SAP Business One Client with configuration written to its stdin

Timeout set to 1 minutes

*** SAP Business One Client Log ***

[0330/142001.109:ERROR:tcp_socket_win.cc(356)] bind() returned an error: Only one usage of each socket address (protocol/network address/port) is normally permitted. (0x2740)

[0330/142001.120:ERROR:devtools_http_handler.cc(298)] Cannot start http server for devtools.

Command line parsed

StatusBar Warning Message: Failed to assign SAP Business One user license to SAP Add-Ons

[0330/142004.214:ERROR:simple_backend_impl.cc(734)] Simple Cache Backend: wrong file structure on disk: 2 path: C:\ProgramData\SAP\SAP Business One\Log\SAP Business One\Administrator\BusinessOne\Dump\..\BrowserCache\20840\Code Cache\js

[0330/142004.214:ERROR:simple_backend_impl.cc(734)] Simple Cache Backend: wrong file structure on disk: 2 path: C:\ProgramData\SAP\SAP Business One\Log\SAP Business One\Administrator\BusinessOne\Dump\..\BrowserCache\20840\Code Cache\wasm

*** SAP Business One Client Log ***

Process timeout; terminating client process

Process timeout; terminated

SAP Business One Client return code:-1

Distributing results

Unable to extract HTML report output to file C:\Users\ADMINI~1.TRA\AppData\Local\Temp\Report.html Error code:-2028

Unable to extract PDF report output to file C:\Users\ADMINI~1.TRA\AppData\Local\Temp\Report.pdf Error code:-2028

Unable to extract XML report output to file C:\Users\ADMINI~1.TRA\AppData\Local\Temp\Report.xml Error code:-2028

entry.title: Load Crystal Report data from order without save draft
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We recently updated our Feature Pack from 2108 to 2511 (yes, I know that's a significant jump). After this update, our Crystal Report layout — used in order drafts — stopped reflecting unsaved changes in real time. Previously, any modifications made to an order draft were immediately visible in the Crystal Report preview, even before saving. Now, we need to save the draft first in order to see the changes reflected in the report.

My question is: did this behavior change intentionally in one of the Feature Packs between 2108 and 2511? Is saving the draft now a requirement by design, or is there a workaround to restore the previous behavior?

Any help would be appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Transitioning from SAP Business One to S/4HANA Consulting – Advice?
entry.content:
In my current role I work as an ERP Systems Analyst supporting SAP Business One across multiple entities.

My background is in finance, and I was previously involved in the ERP implementation migrating from Sage 50 to SAP Business One.

In my current role I work with SQL reporting, pricing structures, system configuration, and supporting business processes across finance, sales, and operations.

I’m interested in eventually moving towards working with SAP S/4HANA and consulting roles in the enterprise SAP ecosystem.

For those who have made a similar transition from SAP Business One or other ERP systems into S/4HANA consulting, what experience or steps helped you make that move?

Any advice would be appreciated. I'm based in the UK.

entry.title: Resize the List when link UDT
entry.content: I have a UDF linked to a UDT that contains Code and Name columns, but when I link it, the displayed list is too large. Is there any way to reduce the size of the table?

entry.title: Transaction Notification to Block creating vendor
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m looking for some guidance on creating a Transaction Notification in SAP Business One (HANA).

Requirement:
I need to restrict specific users from creating Vendors, while still allowing them to create Customers/Leads.

Thanks in advance!

@ALL

entry.title: Outlook intergation installation failed.
entry.content: I recently installed SAP B1 on my computer. Both the outlook and SAP has been installed with 64bits. the Addin is available in the Outlook (the classic version). I have included the license for add-on. The SAP version is: SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.320) FP 2602 (64-bit). Please assist me

entry.title: PO Approval Templates in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi, I am totally new to SAP and I'm still a beginner.

i have the below question, i hope someone can assist me.

We have to set the approval templates according to our new LOA inside SAP. If we were to activate and deactivate the approval templates, there will be a lot and we may miss out.

What we thought was to create a query for each active templates to have an end date ex: 05.04.26 and create a new template with effective date 06.04.26 according to the PO amount.

If we do this, we do not need to inform approvers to clear the old PO’s before the planned end date and then activate the new templates, also to avoid any confusion. Our objective was to have a system wise control.

However after trying this for few times, it doesn’t trigger approvals but ended up with errors as below. Do you have a better solution? Really need some expertise advice.

 

ERR - Could not commit transaction error -1 detected during transaction ECM5

entry.title: Customization of dashboard in SAP B1
entry.content:
I am using SAP B1 10.0. I want to customize user wise dashboard. I referred the table CDIC for developing the customized dashboard. In this table, there is no provision for bifurcating the dashboard as per the user. There is no column which saves the primary key of user.  How do I develop customized user wise dashboard ? 

These are my requirements - 

1. The upper half should contain specific documents to be shown as per the logged user.

2. Also, the upper half should contain common documents to be shown for all the users.

3. The lower half should have browser widget which will contain specific link to all users. This lower part will be common for all the users.

In the attached image, you can see my exact requirement.

entry.title: SAP Business One Period-End Closing executes but no Journal Entry is created (no error)
entry.content:
Hi,

I am facing a critical issue with the Period-End Closing process in SAP Business One 9.2 and would appreciate your expert advice.

Current Situation:
I am trying to perform the Period-End Closing for the fiscal year 2025.

When I click the 'Execute' button in the Period-End Closing window, the status bar shows progress (it moves), but no Journal Entries (JE) are actually created.

There are no error messages or pop-ups. The process simply finishes with no results, and the account balances remain unchanged in the list.

I have already confirmed that:

All target accounts have balances in the grid.

The Posting Period for 2025 is set to 'Closing Period'.

G/L Account Determination (Retained Earnings and Period-End Closing accounts) is correctly configured.

Background (Previous Year History):
I suspect this might be related to what happened in the previous fiscal year (2024):

In 2024, I performed the Period-End Closing via the standard tool.

However, for certain reasons, I cancelled (reversed) the automatically generated JEs and then manually created JEs to close the accounts because the tool wouldn't let me re-run it at that time.

In the SQL Profiler, I also discovered that the system executes: EXEC sp_executesql N'DELETE T0 FROM [dbo].[CCPD] T0 WHERE T0.[PerAbs] = (@P1)', N'@P1 int', 109 right before the process stops.

I am wondering if this manual intervention in 2024 has corrupted the "closing flag" or the "Opening Balance" logic for 2025, preventing the tool from executing properly this year.

Questions:

1. Does manual closing in the previous year prevent the Period-End Closing tool from working in the subsequent year?

2. Is there a way to reset the "Closing" status or flags in the database so that the tool recognizes the 2025 balances as ready for closing?

Any help or troubleshooting steps would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

entry.title: Updating Bank Accounts on Business Partner using SAP Service Layer on SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I’m trying to update the bank accounts of a Business Partner using SAP Service Layer. My JSON looks like this:

{
"CardCode": "P000454",
"BPBankAccounts": [
{
"AccountNo": "100005411",
"BankCode": "102301063",
"AccountName": "Robinson Grinding and Profiling, LLC JAS",
"Country": "US",
"InternalKey": 6999
}
]
}

When I perform a GET on the same Business Partner, the bank accounts segment returns this:

"BPBankAccounts": [
{
"LogInstance": 0,
"UserNo4": null,
"BPCode": "P000454",
"County": null,
"State": null,
"UserNo2": null,
"IBAN": "",
"ZipCode": null,
"City": null,
"Block": null,
"Branch": null,
"Country": "US",
"Street": null,
"ControlKey": "",
"UserNo3": null,
"BankCode": "102301063",
"AccountNo": "100005411",
"UserNo1": null,
"InternalKey": 6999,
"BuildingFloorRoom": null,
"BIK": null,
"AccountName": "Robinson Grinding and Profiling, LLC",
"CorrespondentAccount": null,
"Phone": null,
"Fax": null,
"CustomerIdNumber": "0",
"ISRBillerID": null,
"ISRType": 2,
"BICSwiftCode": "",
"ABARoutingNumber": null,
"MandateID": null,
"SignatureDate": null,
"MandateExpDate": null,
"SEPASeqType": null,
"U_SEI_LegalName": null,
"U_SEI_Moneda": null,
"U_SEI_TipoC": null,
"U_SEI_CCI": null,
"U_MSS_CtaDet": null
}
]

I included the "InternalKey" in my JSON to see if it helps identify the account, but I keep getting an error saying that the account already exists. How can I solve this issue?. If I use PATCH, it will include a new bank account. But if a use PUT, service layer will ask for the rest of the properties of the business partners which I don't intend to change. 

Many Thanks
SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA SAP Business One

entry.title: India Withholding Tax - Maintenance of New Income Type Including Section 393 - Effective 1st April 2
entry.content:
Due to the introduction of the Income Tax Act, 2025, all non-salary withholding tax sections (194, 195, 196 series) will be consolidated into a new TDS section, Section 393, effective 1st April 2026.

Additionally, section names have been changed to 1001, 1002, but updating these in the system is not possible due to character limits.

Based on these changes, TDS certificates are also being generated accordingly. Could you please clarify how these updates will impact reporting and file generation?

Kindly provide guidance on how to implement these changes in SAP Business One.

SAP Business One

entry.title: How is table ORDR field ImportEnt used?
entry.content:
https://help.sap.com/doc/089315d8d0f8475a9fc84fb919b501a3/10.0/en-US/SDKHelp/Marketing_Documents/ORDR.htm

There is no further explanation how this field is used. I currently work in a setup where this field in B1 has been somehow renamed (how can one do this?) and I need to know what its original purpose is and how it gets used in B1.

entry.title: SAP Business One SDK
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on SAP Business One 10.0 (SQL) using the UI API (VB.NET add-on).

Code I'm Following:

Private Sub AddEmbeddedBrowser()
Try
If oForm Is Nothing Then Exit Sub

Try
oBrowserItem = oForm.Items.Item("Brw1")
oBrowser = CType(oBrowserItem.Specific, SAPbouiCOM.WebBrowser)
Catch
oBrowserItem = oForm.Items.Add("Brw1", SAPbouiCOM.BoFormItemTypes.it_WEB_BROWSER)
oBrowserItem.Left = 80
oBrowserItem.Top = 210
oBrowserItem.Width = 720
oBrowserItem.Height = 300
oBrowserItem.FromPane = 0
oBrowserItem.ToPane = 0
oBrowserItem.Visible = True
oBrowser = CType(oBrowserItem.Specific, SAPbouiCOM.WebBrowser)
End Try

oBrowser.Url = "http://192.168.183.100:5173/login"

Catch ex As Exception
SBOApp.StatusBar.SetText(
If(isHebrew, "טעינת הדפדפן נכשלה: " & ex.Message, "Browser load failed: " & ex.Message),
SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short,
SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Error)
End Try
End Sub

Requirement:
I have created a user defined form (Quick Access screen) using XML and VB code. This form contains multiple clickable static text items which open standard SAP forms using ActivateMenuItem, and that functionality is working correctly.

Now I have a requirement to embed a browser inside this same SAP form (in an empty area of the form) and load a web application URL:

http://192.168.183.100:5173/login

The expectation is:
The browser should load inside the SAP form itself and behave like a normal browser. After login, it should continue navigation within the same embedded area.

What I tried:
I attempted to dynamically add a WebBrowser control using UI API at runtime:

oBrowserItem = oForm.Items.Add("Brw1", SAPbouiCOM.BoFormItemTypes.it_WEB_BROWSER)

Issue:
At this exact line, SAP Business One client crashes completely and shows the standard error dialog:
“SAP Business One has encountered a problem and needs to close.”

From the add-on side, I receive:
The remote procedure call failed. (Exception from HRESULT: 0x800706BE)

Observations:
The crash happens immediately when adding the it_WEB_BROWSER item, even before setting any URL.
The issue is 100% reproducible.
Without this line, the form works perfectly.
The issue seems to be occurring inside SAP client (not a handled SDK exception).

Environment:
SAP Business One 10.0 (SQL)
VB.NET Add-on (UI API)
Custom form loaded via XML
Local web app (Vite/React) running on port 5173

Questions:

  1. Is it_WEB_BROWSER supported and stable in SAP B1 10.0 (SQL) user defined forms?

  2. Has anyone faced SAP client crash while adding WebBrowser item?

  3. Are there any prerequisites, settings, or patch-level dependencies required for using this control?

  4. Is there any alternative recommended way to embed a web page inside a SAP B1 form?

I have also attached the crash screenshot for reference.

Any guidance would be very helpful.

Thanks.

entry.title: UDF value field disappears in SAP Business One document form
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am facing an issue in SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.181) FP 2111 (64-bit) with a User-Defined Field (UDF) on a document form.

The field label/area exists, but the value/input part of the field disappears and does not show properly in the document.

What I already tried:

  • Removed and added the field again
  • Checked the UI customization/template
  • Verified that the field appears in some modes
  • Tested form settings/edit form
  • Reapplied the customization


Additional detail:

In my case, the field may appear in the template or edit mode, but it does not display correctly when opening a new document.

Has anyone seen this behavior before?

entry.title: how to import primary form item in data transfer workbench
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to upload/import primary form item specifically on outgoing payment in data transfer workbench can anyone assist me? we need to upload bulk data instead of manual updating in JE. Thanks.

entry.title: Cannot import Journal Entry via Import from Excel (Date Error)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I get an error when i try to upload JE from "Import From Excel functionality"

Everything is done as in Preparing a Microsoft Excel Import File for Journal Entry 

But still get this error for posting date field.
Invalid value "YYYY-MM-DD" in row 1, column 3, for field "Posting Date[OJDT.RefDate]"

 



Version of sap B1 : SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.311) SP 2511 (Security) HOTFIX1
